bio: I'm a Data Engineer and Digital Systems Specialist with over 10 years of experience building the data infrastructure behind complex, high-stakes programmes. From ETL pipelines and API integrations to Power BI dashboards and self-hosted Docker stacks, I work across the full data lifecycle.

What sets me apart is the combination of deep technical capability and applied domain knowledge. I've built systems for global health, humanitarian operations, and enterprise analytics — and I bring the same rigour and attention to data quality to every engagement, regardless of sector.

hero.tagline: Engineering the systems that turn raw data into decisions — from pipelines to dashboards to production infrastructure.
